name: @graphorin/benchmark-locomo-multilingual
description: Reserved per-locale LoCoMo contribution hooks for the Graphorin framework. Ships empty subset directories (ar/de/es/fr/hi/it/ja/pt/ru/zh) and a documented contribution flow for community-translated question packs consumed by @graphorin/benchmark-memory-smoke via --subset. No datasets are bundled, so the per-locale subsets are not runnable until a locale pack is contributed. Created and maintained by Oleksiy Stepurenko.
author: Oleksiy Stepurenko

scripts.dev: echo "no dev entry for this package" && exit 0
scripts.build: echo "no build needed for this package" && exit 0
